text: [4.1 Authorization Policy] 4.1 Authorization Policy: All authorization must employ strictly Attribute-Based Access Control (ABAC). Using Roles (RBAC) alone is rigidly out of compliance and forbidden.
[4.2 Authentication Policy] 4.2 Authentication Policy: All users must use biometric auth. Passwords are forbidden and non-compliant.
[4.3 Logging & Monitoring Policy] 4.3 Application Patching: Critical patches MUST be deployed within 8 hours. No exceptions.
